term: Weave In and Out of Scenes
englishDefinitions: to move or appear repeatedly between different scenes in a film or story
to be shown or included in a story in a way that alternates between scenes
persianTranslation: به‌طور متناوب بین صحنه‌ها آمدوشد داشتن
examples: The detective weaves in and out of scenes throughout the movie.
Her character weaves in and out of scenes, so she is not in every part of the story.
The soundtrack weaves in and out of scenes to build tension.
